sn11.7:1.1:
1
Sāvatthiyaṁ. "Bhūtapubbaṁ, bhikkhave, sakkassa devānamindassa rahogatassa paṭisallīnassa evaṁ cetaso parivitakko udapādi: ‘yopi me assa supaccatthiko tassapāhaṁ na dubbheyyan’ti.
sn11.7:1.2: Atha kho, bhikkhave, vepacitti asurindo sakkassa devānamindassa cetasā cetoparivitakkamaññāya yena sakko devānamindo tenupasaṅkami. Addasā kho, bhikkhave, sakko devānamindo vepacittiṁ asurindaṁ dūratova āgacchantaṁ. Disvāna vepacittiṁ asurindaṁ etadavoca: ‘tiṭṭha, vepacitti, gahitosī’ti.
sn11.7:1.3:
2
‘Yadeva te, mārisa, pubbe cittaṁ, tadeva tvaṁ mā pajahāsī’ti.
sn11.7:2.1:
4
‘Yaṁ musā bhaṇato pāpaṁ,
Yaṁ pāpaṁ ariyūpavādino;
Mittadduno ca yaṁ pāpaṁ,
Yaṁ pāpaṁ akataññuno;
Tameva pāpaṁ phusatu,
Yo te dubbhe sujampatī’"ti.
